summary: Added a one-line docstring to the repo_root_from_script function in tools/reference/synrail_install_v0.py.
git_diff:
diff --git a/tools/reference/synrail_install_v0.py b/tools/reference/synrail_install_v0.py
index 74ef08c..3ce89cc 100644
--- a/tools/reference/synrail_install_v0.py
+++ b/tools/reference/synrail_install_v0.py
@@ -14,6 +14,7 @@ from pathlib import Path
 
 
 def repo_root_from_script() -> Path:
+    """Return the absolute path to the repository root relative to this script."""
     return Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]

diff_provenance.added_line: """Return the absolute path to the repository root relative to this script."""
diff_provenance.provenance_note: Docstring added and verified with grep.
